info.english_meaning: to be pleased to be delighted to be happy

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'santfzwo BAryayA BartA BartrA BAryA taTEva ca' (manu॰3.60) prIta ityarTaH ihApi samSabdo nArTe vESizwyaM kimapi karoti
'santozamUlaM hi suKaM duHKamUlaM viparyayaH' (manu॰4.12) sannihitasADanAdaDikasyAnAditsA santoza iti yogAH
'dUrvANkurErapi saMBftayA saparyayA kila paraM parituzyasi' (BA0 pu0 536) parituzyasi atimAtraM prasIdasi
'vyasanezu ca sarvezu piteva Bavati duHKitaH utsavezu ca sarvezu piteva parituzyati' (rA0 2233).. parituzyati hfzyati nandati
'vayamiha parituzwA valkalEstvaM dUkUlEH' (Bartf0 354) parituzwAH santuzwAH tfptAH
'A paritozAd viduzAM na sADu manye prayogavijYAnam' (SA0 12) paritozaH prasattiH
